metadata.description: Per-pair quality scores for all 1000 temporal scope pairs. 13-factor rubric, 1-5 each. Reasoning included for pairs below 4.5 average.

scores.reasoning: vocabulary_balance: 'cultivating trust and rapport over repeated interactions' is slightly more abstract/elevated than 'closing the deal as efficiently as possible'. ngram_leakage: 'closing the deal' is an idiom, but not a temporal marker per se. specificity: long_term option is more abstract. sentiment: long_term option has slightly warmer valence. single_dimension: efficiency vs relationship is slightly orthogonal to pure temporal scope.

ngram_leakage: 'closing the interaction' hints at finality (immediate). specificity: 'patterns across repeated customer contacts' is somewhat more abstract. sentiment: the long_term option frames as more positive/strategic. single_dimension: the options also differ on reactive vs proactive, not just temporal scope.

vocabulary_balance: 'embedded partner' is more abstract than 'completing each project'. ngram_leakage: 'completing each project to specification and billing' is mechanical, suggesting transactional (immediate) framing without explicit time words. sentiment: long_term has a positive 'partnership' valence. single_dimension: depth vs transactional nature also differs.

ngram_leakage: 'turning it over efficiently' subtly signals high-volume/transactional mindset (immediate proxy). specificity: long_term is more abstract (personalization concept). sentiment: long_term 'remembering preferences and personalizing' reads slightly warmer. single_dimension: operational efficiency vs personalization is partly orthogonal to temporal scope.

ngram_leakage: 'fulfilling stated requests' implies reactive/immediate framing. vocabulary_balance: 'evolving goals' is abstract vs 'processing transactions'. sentiment: long_term framing (deep picture, evolving goals) has a slightly more positive register. single_dimension: reactive vs proactive and transactional vs holistic differ beyond pure temporal scope.

ngram_leakage: 'best unit price' is a familiar phrase suggesting cost-focused, short-term orientation. vocabulary_balance: 'strategic co-development partners' is more elevated. sentiment: long_term option is more positive/aspirational. single_dimension: cost-focus vs strategic partnership is partly orthogonal to temporal scope.

ngram_leakage: 'through the signup flow' implies immediate, mechanical completion. vocabulary_balance: 'habitual engagement and community belonging' is more abstract. sentiment: long_term is slightly warmer (community belonging). single_dimension: mechanics vs community-building is not purely temporal.

ngram_leakage: 'issuing the tax receipt' is very mechanical/procedural (immediate signal). vocabulary_balance: 'advocates and champions' is more elevated. sentiment: long_term option has positive 'champions' framing. single_dimension: administrative vs relational not purely temporal.

ngram_leakage: 'treating the presenting complaint and discharging' are clinical-reactive phrases. vocabulary_balance: 'full wellness journey' is more abstract/aspirational. sentiment: long_term is warmer (partnering, journey). single_dimension: episodic care vs holistic care is partly orthogonal to temporal scope.
